title: Swarm Manifest
description: Checkpoint file that tracks swarm audit progress across phases and agents.

swarm_id.description: Unique identifier for this swarm run (e.g. swarm-portlight-a1b2c3d4).

commit_sha.description: Full 40-character hex commit SHA that this swarm targets.

branch.description: Branch name at the time the swarm was started.

status.description: Current phase of the swarm lifecycle.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the swarm was created.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the swarm finished, or null if still running.

prior_state.description: Snapshot of the repo's previous audit/dogfood state before this swarm.

last_audit_posture.description: Posture grade from the most recent audit (e.g. A, B, C, D, F).

last_dogfood_verdict.description: Verdict from the most recent dogfood run (e.g. pass, fail, skip).

last_audit_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent audit.

components.description: Repository components discovered during the explore phase.

id.description: Stable identifier for this component (e.g. core-engine, cli-handler).

type.description: Component archetype (e.g. library, cli, server, config, test-suite).

paths.description: File or directory paths owned by this component, relative to repo root.

language.description: Primary programming language of this component.

estimated_loc.description: Estimated lines of code in this component.

has_tests.description: Whether this component has associated test coverage.

applicable_domains.description: Audit domains relevant to this component (e.g. security, errors, docs, hygiene).

assignments.description: Map of component_id to agent assignment. Keys must match a component id.

agent_slot.description: Zero-indexed agent slot assigned to this component.

file_paths.description: Specific file paths this agent is responsible for auditing.

phases.description: Per-phase execution status. Keys are phase names matching the scenario steps.

agents.description: Number of parallel agents used in this phase.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this phase began.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this phase finished.

total_findings.description: Total number of findings across all components.

by_severity.description: Findings broken down by severity level.

fixed.description: Number of findings remediated in this swarm run.

accepted_risk.description: Number of findings explicitly accepted as risk.

remaining.description: Number of findings still open after this swarm run.
